subcodes.first_line: O Taqi! Thou hast indeed attained unto the Kawthar of utterance from the bounteous hand of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Yet again do I bid thee render thanks unto thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا تقی قد فزت بکوثر البیان من ید عطاء ربک الرحمن و هذه مره اخری ان اشکر ربک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
